title: Authors
description: Author directory powered by the autori collection.

resources.name: Authors Data
resources.description: Structured content for the authors page.

resources.name: Site Map
resources.description: Structured content for the map of this site

tools.name: update-section
tools.description: Update a section field in the Studio draft. Does not persist — call save when all updates are complete. Use sectionType to select the matching schema from sectionSchemas.

tools.name: save
tools.description: Persist all pending draft changes using the active save mode (local file, hot save, or save2repo). Call once after all update-section calls are complete.
